allow: PowerShell(.\\.venv\\Scripts\\django-admin.exe startproject django_project .; .\\.venv\\Scripts\\python.exe manage.py startapp accounts; .\\.venv\\Scripts\\python.exe manage.py startapp music; .\\.venv\\Scripts\\python.exe manage.py startapp pages; Write-Output "=== TREE ==="; Get-ChildItem -Recurse -Directory | Where-Object { $_.FullName -notmatch '\\.venv' } | Select-Object FullName)

PowerShell($env:DEBUG='True'; $proc = Start-Process -FilePath ".\\.venv\\Scripts\\python.exe" -ArgumentList "manage.py","runserver","127.0.0.1:8009","--noreload" -PassThru -WindowStyle Hidden; Start-Sleep -Seconds 4; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:8009/" -UseBasicParsing; Write-Output "STATUS: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; if \($r.Content -match 'Benvenuto su BeatToBeat'\) { Write-Output 'HOME OK: titolo trovato' } else { Write-Output 'HOME: titolo NON trovato' }; $admin = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:8009/admin/" -UseBasicParsing -MaximumRedirection 0 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Output "ADMIN STATUS: $\($admin.StatusCode\)" } catch { Write-Output "ERRORE: $_" } finally { Stop-Process -Id $proc.Id -Force })
